matrix.velocity_impact: Stops entirely for 1-3 sprints (Maximal immediate impact)
matrix.business_benefit: High (Recovers lost velocity and unlocks major roadmap features)
matrix.best_for: System in crisis, SQALE < 4, high revenue impact outages.

matrix.error_risk: Medium (Refactoring while modifying features carries regression risk)
matrix.velocity_impact: Slows releases slightly (e.g., 20% capacity penalty per sprint)
matrix.business_benefit: Medium (Prevents debt from worsening while delivering value)
matrix.best_for: Manageable debt, Code Climate 2-3, stable but aging systems.

matrix.error_risk: High (Security and regression risks compound rapidly)
matrix.velocity_impact: Maximized short-term, but collapses entirely in the long-term (The 'Debt Cliff')
matrix.business_benefit: Low/Negative (Only valid if chasing critical first-to-market survival)
matrix.investor_priority: Low (Seen as poor technical management unless explicitly a throwaway prototype)
matrix.best_for: Y-Combinator MVPs, Throwaway prototypes, Proofs of Concept (POCs).
